name: Pacific Silk Road Resources Group Inc.
summary: Pacific Silk Road Resources Group Inc., an exploration stage mining company, engages in the acquisition, exploration, and development of mineral properties in Canada. It explores for potash deposits. The company was formerly known as Pacific Potash Corporation and changed its name to Pacific Silk Road Resources Group Inc. in June 2018. Pacific Silk Road Resources Group Inc. was founded in 2006 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
